tasks.title: Group CLI --help output by user intent (Expert Review Refinements (v0.9.0))
tasks.description:
Reorder Cobra command listing in `roady --help` into groups
(Get Started, Track & Report, Integrate, Admin) using cobra
command groups so the golden path surfaces above the noise.
Pure presentation, no API breakage.

tasks.title: Make `roady init` interactive by default (Expert Review Refinements (v0.9.0))
tasks.description:
When `roady init` runs without --template or in a TTY, default
to the existing wizard flow. Add --non-interactive flag for CI.
Prints next-step CTA on completion (run `roady setup <tool>`).

tasks.title: Add `roady demo` command (Expert Review Refinements (v0.9.0))
tasks.description:
New top-level command that scaffolds a pre-seeded .roady/ with
an intentional spec/plan/state divergence and runs drift detect
so a new user sees the product's core value in <60 seconds with
zero prerequisites. Exits cleanly, suggests `roady drift accept`.

tasks.title: Empty-state CTAs on `roady status` (Expert Review Refinements (v0.9.0))
tasks.description:
When `roady status` runs against an uninitialized or empty
project, replace the bare warning with an actionable next-step
ladder: init -> spec analyze -> plan generate -> task ready.
Detects which step is missing and points there.

tasks.title: Eval fixture corpus for spec -> plan (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add an `evals/fixtures/` directory with 2-3 representative spec
inputs (small CLI, web API, multi-feature) and corresponding
golden plan structures (task IDs + dependency edges) used to
anchor regression tests for the heuristic and AI planners.

tasks.title: Eval runner test harness (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add `evals/runner_test.go` that loads each fixture, invokes the
heuristic PlanService against it, and asserts the produced task
IDs and dependency closure match the golden. Runs under standard
`go test ./evals/...` and is wired into CI naturally.

tasks.title: Eval harness documentation (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Document how to add a new fixture, how to update goldens after
an intentional planner change, and the policy for AI-provider
evals (mock provider in CI, optional matrix run locally).

tasks.title: Task.Origin provenance field (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add an Origin field on planning.Task ("heuristic" | "ai" | "human")
with a default of "heuristic" so existing data stays valid. The
heuristic planner tags every task it emits as "heuristic"; the AI
planning service tags AI-produced tasks as "ai". Status/plan
readouts surface the origin so reviewers can scrutinise AI tasks.

tasks.title: CompletionResponse confidence and source refs (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Extend ai.CompletionResponse with optional Confidence (0..1) and
SourceRefs ([]SourceRef{Doc, Span}) fields. Provider impls fill
these where supported; callers may ignore. Non-breaking — additive
struct fields only.

tasks.title: Consolidate task-listing MCP tools into roady_tasks (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add a parameterised roady_tasks MCP tool that supersedes
roady_get_ready_tasks / roady_get_in_progress_tasks /
roady_get_blocked_tasks. Take a status enum parameter
(ready|in_progress|blocked|all). Keep the legacy tools registered
as deprecation aliases that delegate to the new handler so agents
already coded against them keep working.

tasks.title: Pre-flight roady_cost_estimate MCP tool (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add an MCP tool that estimates input/output tokens and USD cost
for the planned AI operations (generate_plan, smart_decompose,
review_spec, explain_drift, query) before they run. Estimates use
current spec size, the configured AI provider, and a model
pricing table for common providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini,
Ollama). Lets agents and humans decide whether to proceed before
burning tokens.

tasks.title: Standardise MCP tool names with deprecation aliases (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add canonical aliases for two off-pattern tool names while
keeping the originals registered. roady_smart_decompose gets a
roady_plan_decompose alias. roady_sticky_drift gets a
roady_drift_recurring alias. Both legacy names get a DEPRECATED
marker in their description. Pure additive change.

tasks.title: Unify outbound notifications under roady notify (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add a top-level roady notify command with add/list/test/remove
subcommands that share the messaging-adapter implementation
today fragmented across roady messaging and roady webhook notif.
Existing commands stay registered as deprecation aliases that
print a one-line migration hint and delegate to the same
handlers. No data migration; both legacy paths keep working.

tasks.title: Eval matrix over AI planner with programmable mock provider (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Extend evals/ to cover the AI planning pipeline (DecomposeSpec)
using a programmable mock provider that returns canned JSON.
Assert tasks parse, the Origin field is set to "ai", required
fields populate, and feature coverage is preserved. Lays the
groundwork for an opt-in real-provider matrix gated on a build
tag so CI never spends tokens.

tasks.title: Drift detector precision and recall corpus (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add a synthetic-divergence corpus to evals/. Each scenario
stages a spec/plan/state trio with a known mismatch (intent
drift via lock divergence, plan drift via missing requirement,
no drift in the healthy baseline). The runner asserts the
DriftService report contains exactly the expected issue
categories — locking down precision (no false positives on
healthy state) and recall (all known mismatches surface).

tasks.title: Wire source-doc citations through spec analyze to tasks (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add an optional Source{Doc,Line} on spec.Feature and spec.Requirement
captured during AnalyzeDirectory parsing (markdown file path +
heading line number). Heuristic planner copies the originating
feature's Source onto each emitted task so the plan carries
traceability back to the doc that motivated it. Status output
shows a "from doc:line" annotation when present.

tasks.title: AI command progress feedback and clean cancellation (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Wrap each AI-backed CLI invocation (plan generate --ai, plan
smart-decompose, plan prioritize, drift explain, query) in a
shared helper that prints an elapsed-time tick every few
seconds while the provider is working and translates SIGINT
into a context cancellation so users can abort runaway calls
without leaking the request. Doherty Threshold mitigation;
no provider interface change.

tasks.title: OnToken streaming callback on CompletionRequest (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add an optional OnToken func(chunk string) field on
ai.CompletionRequest so streaming-capable providers can emit
token chunks as they arrive. Non-streaming providers ignore
the field; existing callers are unaffected (additive only).
Add a streaming-capable mock provider used by tests to lock
the contract. Real per-provider SSE wiring lands separately.

tasks.title: Bridge AI streaming to MCP progress notifications (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Wire an MCP-side helper that, when a ProgressToken is supplied
on the request context, installs an OnToken callback (via
ai.WithOnToken) that forwards each streamed chunk as an MCP
progress notification. Apply to every AI-backed MCP handler:
explain_drift, explain_spec, query, suggest_priorities,
review_spec, smart_decompose. Clients that subscribe to the
progress token see token-by-token output; clients that don't
see no behavioural change.

tasks.title: EVAL_AI build-tag harness for opt-in real-provider matrix (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Add a //go:build evals_ai gated test file that exercises the
real Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini / Ollama providers against a
shared spec when the corresponding API key env vars are set.
Documented in evals/README. Default builds skip it; opt-in
with `go test -tags evals_ai ./evals/...` for local validation.

tasks.title: AI tasks inherit source citations from spec features (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Today the heuristic planner copies spec.Feature.Source / spec.Requirement.Source
onto each emitted task, but tasks produced by the AI planner
(DecomposeSpec) never carry Source because the JSON the model
returns has no source field. Post-process the AI task list and
backfill TaskSource by looking up the originating Feature (and
optionally Requirement) by ID. Same goes for the coverage
fallback path. Result: every task in the plan, regardless of
origin, carries provenance back to the doc that motivated it.

tasks.title: Real provider streaming wired end-to-end (AI Quality & Telemetry (v0.10.0))
tasks.description:
Replace the contract-only streaming with real implementations:
(a) Anthropic SSE messages endpoint with content_block_delta
parsing, (b) OpenAI Chat Completions SSE delta parsing,
(c) Gemini streamGenerateContent with alt=sse, (d) Ollama
NDJSON Stream:true. Each provider emits via OnToken when set,
falls back to its existing buffered behaviour otherwise, and
populates Confidence from the natural stop signal where one
exists. Wire ai.WithOnToken / OnTokenFromContext through
AIPlanningService so a single CLI/MCP layer setter rides
through all nine AI call sites. CLI withAIProgress installs
the sink, prints streamed tokens to stderr, and steps the
elapsed-time ticker out of the way once tokens flow. Locked
by httptest-backed unit tests for each provider plus an
evals/streaming_runner_test end-to-end check.
